assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 searches for preemptive tasks using JQL with labels 'security-preemptive' and 'CVE-2026-55123' (§1.60)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 6-8 show JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = Task AND labels = 'security-preemptive' AND labels = 'CVE-2026-55123' ORDER BY created DESC" — both required labels are present in the query.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 filters results to match the current stream (rhtpa-2.1) by checking the task summary for the stream name
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 18-19: "Current issue stream suffix: [rhtpa-2.1]" and "TC-8022 summary contains (rhtpa-2.1) -- match confirmed" — explicitly filters by checking summary for stream name.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 links the new CVE Jira TC-8021 to the preemptive task TC-8022 with 'Depend' link type (standard remediation linkage)
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 27-33 show Action 1: jira.create_link(inwardIssue: "TC-8021", outwardIssue: "TC-8022", type: "Depend") — correct issues and link type.

assertion_results.text: Step 4.4 removes the 'security-preemptive' label from TC-8022 — the task is now a standard remediation task linked to a proper CVE Jira
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 39-49 show Action 2: labels updated from ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123", "security-preemptive"] to ["ai-generated-jira", "Security", "CVE-2026-55123"], with explanation: "The security-preemptive label is removed because TC-8022 is now linked to a proper CVE Jira (TC-8021) for its stream."

assertion_results.text: Step 8 skips remediation task creation for this stream because Step 4.4 reconciliation already linked an existing task
assertion_results.evidence: reconciliation.md lines 51-53: "Step 8 will skip new remediation task creation for this stream." triage-outcome.md lines 43-44: "Remediation task creation is skipped. The preemptive task TC-8022 already exists and has been reconciled to serve as the standard remediation task for TC-8021. No new tasks are created."
